subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth, that it may draw all creation nigh unto God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Through My remembrance have the sincere been drawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق لیقرب الخلق الی الله المهیمن القیوم بذکری انجذب الموحدون الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
